user_system_path: Owner-named maintenance seam (no GitHub issue): merge the 4 low-risk dependabot bumps and leave Stripe (4-major jump) for a dedicated pass. Bumps: @supabase/supabase-js 2.108.1->2.108.2 (runtime patch), autoprefixer 10.4.21->10.5.0 (dev), prettier 3.6.2->3.8.4 (dev), supabase CLI 2.39.2->2.107.0 (dev). Verified via typecheck + build + pre-push public-routes smoke. Stripe 18.x->22.x intentionally NOT included (breaking-change review needed). Contract is re-scoped to allow package.json + package-lock.json for this seam, then restored to the between-rungs form in the same branch so main stays clean. Constraint: NO paid API calls — proven in the local harness.
allowed_files_raw: Owner-named dependency-bump seam: only package.json + package-lock.json plus control-plane + docs may change.
forbidden_files_raw: No runtime/schema/api changes — this seam is dependency bumps only (and only the 4 low-risk ones; Stripe excluded).
required_local_proof: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run gate:continuity
browser_proof_command: git push (pre-push hook runs build + public-routes e2e smoke)
acceptance_condition: The 4 safe bumps applied; typecheck + build clean; pre-push smoke green; gate:continuity green; Stripe left at 18.x; contract restored to between-rungs scope before merge.
anti_regression_checks: typecheck + build clean with bumped deps
stop_condition: Stop when the 4 safe bumps are merged, the 4 dependabot PRs are closed, and the control plane is rolled back to the between-rungs form.
next_command: After merge, roll the control plane back to the between-rungs form and review the Stripe 18->22 bump (#437) as its own seam.
